name: ComfyUI-First Autonomous DJ (Main)
goal: Make ComfyUI (starting with ACE-Step 1.5 XL Turbo) the rock-solid primary generation engine for ForageDJ. Support remote pods + local servers. Enable high-quality autonomous/background music generation while the user codes or vibes.
tasks: Finalize deprecation of Python Stable Audio backend on main (clear docs + branch pointers).
Strengthen general ComfyUI workflow execution (beyond simple title injection).
Make remote ComfyUI server configuration (RunPod, Vast, Tailscale, etc.) first-class and easy.
Build background/autonomous generation queue system that can run while user works.
Integrate generated tracks seamlessly into the terminal radio and player experiences.
Evolve the forage-comfy skill into the agent's primary interface for this new world.
